DISCOVERY 302, A R G U E D; DEFENDANT VIRGIN AMERICA, INCORPORATED'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DISCOVERY, COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL FOR SPOILATION OF EVIDENCE AND MISUSES OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF MUST PRODUCE BY OCTOBER 12, ALL E-MAILS NOT PREVIOUSLY PRODUCED REGARDING VIRGIN AMERICA'S PILOT TRAINING/RE-TRAINING. REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS DENIED. MR. HERBST IS NOT TO DELETE ANY E-MAIL AS TO ANY COMMUNICATION WITH REGARDS TO VIRGIN AMERICA'S TERMINATION OF CLIENT. THE COURT DID NOT AWARD TERMINATING SANCTIONS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. AHMAD OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MARY-ALICE COLEMAN, TEL. NO. (530) 758-4234 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ELIA M. DELUCA OF SHEPPARD MULLIN, TEL. NO. 774-3193 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT VIRGIN AMERICA.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF KARL HERBST'S Motion To Quash Defendants Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
Plaintiff's Motion to quash defendant's deposition subpoena for production of business records and request for monetary sanctions is denied as moot. Subpoena was withdrawn. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Compliance With Discovery, Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Req. For Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel For Spoilation Of Evidence And Misuses Of The Discovery; Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. AHMAD OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MARY-ALICE COLEMAN, TEL. NO. (530) 758-4234 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ELIA M. DELUCA OF SHEPPARD MULLIN, TEL. NO. 774-3193 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT VIRGIN AMERICA.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT VIRGIN AMERICA, INCORPORATED'S (Amended) Motion To Compel Compliance With Discovery, Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And His Counsel For Spoilation Of Evidence And Misuses Of The Discovery Process is granted in part. Plaintiff must produce by October 12, all e-mails not previously produced regarding Virgin America's Pilot Training/Re-training. Request for Sanction is denied. Mr. Herbst is not to delete any e-mail as to any communication with regards to Virgin America's termination of client. The court did not award terminating sanctions. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
